contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: Circle-hosting detector end-to-end: keyword-list design + validation against Way Home Shop (matched sound bath/sound healing/breathwork) and Lumin Earth (gap acknowledged — circles on IG only). PR #92 shipped scripts/detect_circle_hosting_retailers.py with the 14-pattern high-precision crawler. PR #93 added .github/workflows/detect_circle_hosting.yml (hourly cron at :50 UTC) and Research → AI: Enrich with contact promotion via DApp Remarks audit trail (skips photo-review brittleness for circle-hosters), plus --rescue-rejected one-shot for retroactive un-rejection. PR #78 on agentic_ai_context tracked the deferred velocity correlation check. Live crawl drained ~213 rows surfacing 33 circle-hoster detections (Esalen Institute, East West Bookshop, Trinity Herbals, Berkeley Herbal Center, Twisted Thistle Apothecary, Enchanted Cottage, Seagrape Apothecary, Queen Hippie Gypsy, etc); also wrote a garyteh_blog post (https://github.com/garyjob/blog/pull/1) framing the circles-cacao detective story as a meditation on AI-as-time-redirector-to-fieldwork. Crawl restarted to finish remaining ~270 rows + apply rescue sweep.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
